Paragraphs (72)–(77) are added on authority of former section 2211(g) which authorized the President to place, from

children.tail: , not more than 30 positions in Levels IV and V of the Federal Executive Salary Schedule. Pursuant to this authority, the President by Executive Order No. 11189,
, as amended by Executive Order No. 11195,
, placed the positions listed in paragraphs (72)–(77) in Level IV.

children.text: Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.text: Chapter 11 of title 2, referred to in text, probably means

children.tail: , which is classified generally to chapter 11 (§ 351 et seq.) of Title 2, The Congress. For complete classification of section 225 to the Code, see Tables.
